dataset_name: Drug Labels and Side Effects Dataset
domain: healthcare, pharmaceutical safety, drug label and adverse effect analysis
data_interpretation_notes: • approval_year, dosage_mg, and price_usd are numeric fields.• expiry_date is a date.• side_effects is a comma-separated list stored as a single text field.• All other columns are categorical text; identifiers such as drug_name and batch_number have no numeric or ordinal meaning.
description: This comprehensive pharmaceutical synthetic dataset contains 1,393 records of synthetic drug information with 15 columns, designed for data science projects focusing on healthcare analytics, drug safety analysis, and pharmaceutical research. The dataset simulates real-world pharmaceutical data with appropriate variety and realistic constraints for machine learning applications. It contains 1,436 rows and 15 columns in CSV format.
embedding_text: Dataset: Drug Labels and Side Effects Dataset. Source: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/pratyushpuri/drug-labels-and-side-effects-dataset-1400-records. Domain: healthcare, pharmaceutical safety, drug label and adverse effect analysis. Rows: 1436. Columns: 15. Description: This comprehensive pharmaceutical synthetic dataset contains 1,393 records of synthetic drug information with 15 columns, designed for data science projects focusing on healthcare analytics, drug safety analysis, and pharmaceutical research. The dataset simulates real-world pharmaceutical data with appropriate variety and realistic constraints for machine learning applications. Data interpretation notes: • approval_year, dosage_mg, and price_usd are numeric fields.• expiry_date is a date.• side_effects is a comma-separated list stored as a single text field.• All other columns are categorical text; identifiers such as drug_name and batch_number have no numeric or ordinal meaning. Column preview: drug_name, manufacturer, approval_year, drug_class, indications, side_effects, dosage_mg, administration_route, contraindications, warnings, price_usd, batch_number, expiry_date, side_effect_severity, approval_status. Use this dataset for retrieval, metadata search, and question answering over local healthcare data.
